summary: A quality-review and hardening surface for moving projects toward release.
final_use_case: It is the anti-overclaim room: it turns ambition into staged proof obligations, release criteria, and review gates.

instruments.input: draft claim, source, counter-source, intended audience
instruments.operation: opens the claim as a review object rather than treating it as finished prose; the step records the decision path so the reader can see how the project moves from input to governed output.
instruments.output: claim record as a reviewable artifact
instruments.upstream_dependency: Requires draft claim, source, counter-source, intended audience
instruments.downstream_use: Feeds claim record as a reviewable artifact; later claims should not rely on this step until its expected output is present.
instruments.proof: Expected proof artifact: claim record as a reviewable artifact
instruments.status: Status: The hardening layer is complete and additive: it sits on top of the original 53MB six-project bundle (preserved verbatim as a nested archive so the.
instruments.gap: Verify one representative case: the step should accept draft claim, source, counter-source, intended audience and produce claim record as a reviewable artifact.
instruments.verification_check: Test one representative case; confirm input (draft claim, source, counter-source, intended audience) produces output (claim record as a reviewable artifact) and leaves a visible decision or artifact.

instruments.input: source strength, contradiction, dissent, revision state
instruments.operation: uses Claim Halo / review chamber logic to expose what authorizes or weakens the claim
instruments.output: claim ceiling and revision decision as a reviewable artifact
instruments.upstream_dependency: Requires source strength, contradiction, dissent, revision state
instruments.downstream_use: Feeds claim ceiling and revision decision as a reviewable artifact; later claims should not rely on this step until its expected output is present.
instruments.proof: Expected proof artifact: claim ceiling and revision decision as a reviewable artifact
instruments.status: Status: The hardening layer is complete and additive: it sits on top of the original 53MB six-project bundle (preserved verbatim as a nested archive so the.
instruments.gap: Verify one representative case: the step should accept source strength, contradiction, dissent, revision state and produce claim ceiling and revision decision as a reviewable artifact.
instruments.verification_check: Test one representative case; confirm input (source strength, contradiction, dissent, revision state) produces output (claim ceiling and revision decision as a reviewable...) and leaves a visible decision or artifact.

instruments.operation: decides whether the claim can publish, must narrow, needs sources, or should be rejected
instruments.output: certified claim or revision task as a reviewable artifact
instruments.upstream_dependency: Requires reviewed claim and evidence state
instruments.downstream_use: Feeds certified claim or revision task as a reviewable artifact; later claims should not rely on this step until its expected output is present.
instruments.proof: Expected proof artifact: certified claim or revision task as a reviewable artifact
